tasks.subject: Task 0: Expand diffUtils into Canonical Diff Module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a single source of truth for all diff computation.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/editor/diffUtils.ts`
- Create: `frontend/src/components/editor/__tests__/diffUtils.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/editor/diffUtils.ts", "frontend/src/components/editor/__tests__/diffUtils.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx vitest run src/components/editor/__tests__/diffUtils.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getHunkItems matches SegmentAnnotationMargin inline logic", "computeHunkIndices matches InlineDiff inline logic", "existing functions unchanged", "unit tests with edge cases"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Create EditorContext for Shared State
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create React context providing shared editor state to all sub-components.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/components/editor/EditorContext.tsx`
- Create: `frontend/src/components/editor/__tests__/EditorContext.test.tsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/editor/TranslationEditor.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/editor/EditorContext.tsx", "frontend/src/components/editor/__tests__/EditorContext.test.tsx", "frontend/src/components/editor/TranslationEditor.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx vitest run src/components/editor/__tests__/EditorContext.test.tsx && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EditorContext provides 8 shared values", "useEditorContext throws outside provider", "TranslationEditor wraps in EditorProvider", "DOM manipulation replaced with declarative state"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extract SegmentRow with React.memo and Stable Callbacks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract 460-line segment render loop into memoized SegmentRow.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/components/editor/SegmentRow.tsx`
- Create: `frontend/src/components/editor/__tests__/SegmentRow.test.tsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/editor/TranslationEditor.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/editor/SegmentRow.tsx", "frontend/src/components/editor/__tests__/SegmentRow.test.tsx", "frontend/src/components/editor/TranslationEditor.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SegmentRow wrapped in React.memo", "consumes EditorContext", "all callbacks useCallback-wrapped", "segment map reduced to ~20 lines", "no visual changes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Migrate Diff Consumers to Canonical diffUtils
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace 3 independent DiffMatchPatch computations with shared diffUtils.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/editor/SegmentAnnotationMargin.tsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/editor/InlineDiff.tsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/editor/ChangesPanel.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/editor/SegmentAnnotationMargin.tsx", "frontend/src/components/editor/InlineDiff.tsx", "frontend/src/components/editor/ChangesPanel.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 files use diffUtils instead of inline DiffMatchPatch", "no DiffMatchPatch import in 3 consumer files", "hunk indices identical"]}
```
